questions.text: Which statement best describes the difference between rights and wants?
options: A new games console is a legal right for every UK citizen
Legal rights are protections in law for freedom, safety, and dignity
Rights must be earned through good behaviour at school and home

questions.text: A workplace introduces a rule that applies to all staff but puts disabled workers at an unfair disadvantage. Which type of discrimination is this most likely to be?
options: Direct discrimination because one person was treated badly
Indirect discrimination because a neutral rule disadvantages a particular group
Victimisation because someone complained about unfair treatment

questions.text: Before carrying out a stop and search in most situations, what must a police officer have?
options: Permission from the person's parents or teachers
A court order signed in advance for each individual search
